title: D2mc-Utils
description: A minecraft mod that adds quality of life features to d2mc (destiny 2 in minecraft).
body:
# D2mc-Utils

A minecraft mod that adds quality of life features to d2mc (Server IP: playd2minecraft.serv.gs).


## Features
- Shows perk descriptions in tooltips (by pressing shift)
- Render vault content in tooltips (by pressing shift or shift+alt)
- More coming soon

## Dependencies
Make sure [shulkerboxtooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) and [fabric-api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/) are installed
